name: Senolytics bone RCT extraction refresh

scope.question: Can the D+Q postmenopausal bone RCT be upgraded from triage summary to source-located registry-extracted outcome/result records?

summary: Added a ClinicalTrials.gov registry source, PubMed and ClinicalTrials source snapshots, exact outcome records, registry-extracted results for CTx, P1NP, BMD, SASP, and adverse events, and five review-lane records for the D+Q bone RCT extraction refresh.

search_log.query: PMID 38956196 XML abstract and citation metadata
search_log.summary: Fetched PubMed XML for abstract-level endpoint results, DOI, article metadata, and ClinicalTrials.gov identifier.
Fetched posted outcome and adverse-event modules for structured registry extraction.

excluded_sources.title: Effects of intermittent senolytic therapy on bone metabolism in postmenopausal women
excluded_sources.reason: PMC browser access was blocked by a web check and NCBI OA utility reported the PMCID was not open-access via the OA endpoint; full-text extraction is deferred.
